meta.title: A study of phosphorylation of the measles membrane protein -- Rima et al. 56 (2): 447 -- Journal of General Virology

abstractHtml: A polypeptide (designated X) which migrates with a mobility similar to the membrane protein (M) of measles virus has been found in virus- infected cells. This polypeptide appears to be phosphorylated. However, limited proteolysis has shown that this protein is not a phosphorylated form of the M protein, but appears related to the P protein of measles virus.
